---
title: "Numerical Validation of OU transition"
author: "Rohan Jayanti, Yat Wai Heung"
format:
  html:
    theme: superhero
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 4.5
    toc-depth: 3
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
jupyter: python3
---

## Simulation Setup

## Simulating a single-path

## Mean validation

To verify the expectation 

- simulate many paths 
- compute empirical mean at time $t$
- compare this with the theoretical mean

## Variance validation

## Stationary distribution
